text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: A good morning to you, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I feel thoroughly refreshed. I used my time
off to rewatch the old Princess Fighter series!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Princess Fighter☆Stars, set in space, is incredible, but you can't ignore the pure awesomeness of Princess Fighter vs. Dark Princess Fighter either! Don't you agree?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems she's had some good rest and is full of
energy once again.
